entities.name: blockages
entities.context: System mechanism that prevents premature progression of incomplete meetings in the pipeline

entities.name: blurbs generation
entities.context: A processing step that must complete before blocked meetings can progress

entities.name: meetings
entities.context: Objects in the processing pipeline that can be blocked, validated, and transitioned

entities.name: re-validation
entities.context: Verification step that allows blocked meetings to progress after prerequisites are met

relationships.context: Blockages prevent incomplete meetings from premature progression
Completion of blurbs generation enables blocked meetings to be re-validated
Re-validation allows blocked meetings to transition to next state
